meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no portfolio (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no portfolio. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve No Portfolio Fast
content.seo_description: Stop worrying about a lack of portfolio. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to build high-end SaaS prototypes in hours, not weeks.
content.answer_block: The 'no portfolio' trap ends by shipping functional, production-ready SaaS projects quickly. By leveraging the Antigravity project template and Claude Code, you can automate boilerplate, focus on business logic, and build a high-quality portfolio piece in under two hours, proving your technical competence to clients immediately.
content.intro:
The blank page is the freelancer's greatest enemy. You have the skills, the ambition, and the hunger for client work, but you are paralyzed by the 'no portfolio' paradox: you need clients to build a portfolio, but you need a portfolio to get clients. It is a vicious cycle that keeps talented developers stuck in the waiting room.

But what if you didn't have to build from scratch? By treating your portfolio like a high-speed sprint, you can bypass the grunt work. Using the Antigravity project template, you can scaffold a professional SaaS architecture in seconds, letting Claude Code handle the heavy lifting while you focus on the features that actually close deals.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Initialize your project environment using the Antigravity CLI to ensure a standardized, production-ready folder structure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a full-stack SaaS project using the Antigravity template, including authentication, database integration, and a clean UI component library.

steps.title: Configure Core Services
steps.description: Use Claude Code to wire up your database schema and authentication providers based on the template requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the project to use Supabase for auth and PostgreSQL for data. Generate the necessary environment variable templates.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'setup database schema for a project management tool with users, tasks, and teams'

steps.title: Build the Killer Feature
steps.description: Focus on one high-impact feature—like an AI-powered dashboard—that highlights your ability to integrate complex APIs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive dashboard component that fetches data from the task table and displays it using a bar chart.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create a dashboard page that pulls task data and renders it with shadcn/ui charts'

steps.title: Optimize for Performance
steps.description: Ensure the application is fast and lightweight, which is a major signal of professional-grade coding standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and implement lazy loading for heavy route components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'run a performance audit and optimize component imports to reduce bundle size'

steps.title: Deploy to Production
steps.description: Push your live project to a public-facing URL so potential clients can interact with your work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Vercel deployment configuration file to optimize for edge runtime and static site generation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create vercel.json and configure build settings for production deployment'

pro_tips: Treat your portfolio project like a real client deliverable; include a README.md that documents your design decisions, not just the code.
Use Claude Code to write unit tests for your critical paths; clients are far more impressed by a tested app than a flashy one.
Avoid generic 'To-Do' apps. Pick a specific niche, like a CRM for dog walkers, to show you understand business requirements.
Keep your git history clean. Each feature should be a distinct commit, showing prospective clients your professional workflow.
Record a 60-second Loom video demonstrating the app. It proves you built it and adds a human touch to your sales process.
content.next_steps: Once your project is live, add the link to your LinkedIn profile and reach out to three potential clients in your niche using the project as a live demo.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting the lack of a portfolio delay your freelancing career. With Antigravity, you can build, ship, and land your first high-ticket client this week. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
